FINDING: src/jobService.ts:3:OPEN_QUESTION
WHAT: `fromMaybeGlobalId` does Buffer.from(id, "base64").toString("utf8") and splits on ":", returning parts[1] verbatim with no format validation. unsafe.
EVIDENCE: jobService.ts:3
IMPACT: malformed input passes through
OPTIONS:
1. add validation
UNVERIFIABLE: no
